description: Bifolio containing an inventory of books in Judaeo-Arabic (3 pages) and a page of accounts for foods and materia medica in Arabic script (1 page). The booklist was edited by Allony et al (who called it T-S NS J 94.53). It includes 57 books, listed apparently at random. Several titles are marked with an overline, perhaps indicating that they were sold. Dating: No earlier than 12th century, as the latest author mentioned is Yehuda ha-Levi (d. 1141). (Information from Allony.)
description_he: דיפלואה עם מלאי ספרים ביהודית-ערבית (3 עמודים) ועמוד חשבונות לאוכל ורפואה בכתב ערבי; 57 ספרים; לא לפני המאה ה-12
